items.reason: Added core LogSampler coverage for rate derivation, normalization, invalid config rejection, random threshold behavior, disabled fast paths, fatal bypass, distribution, and concurrent config reads.
Added proto/config coverage for enabled/disabled snapshots, ppm boundaries, previous-good retention, missing proto handling, and request-only derivation rules.
Added access sampling coverage for CLIENT/ACCESS/REQUEST_OUT classification, request-sampled-in forced retention, zero-rate drops, per-event sampling, and logSampled markers.
Added facade coverage for lazy field providers, sampled-out skip behavior, async/shared ownership patterns, C-array/string-view key handling, and object/stream/request-out record fields.
Added macro integration coverage for LOG/VLOG/PLOG sampling, diagnostic supplement behavior, sampled-in diagnostic forcing, FATAL/CHECK bypass, and background-log bypass.
Updated RPC metadata tests to cover LOG_SAMPLE_UNDECIDED/REJECT behavior and disabled/full/zero request-rate propagation semantics.
Added system coverage for worker-delivered LogSampleConfigPb and multi-client request activity under sampler-enabled worker config.
Updated performance tests to exercise sampler fast paths, rejected expensive payload skipping, sampler-only decision cost, and sampled-out access field construction avoidance.
No test exercises the changed Flags::UpdateFlagParameter sampler-rate transaction path, including validation failure and rollback after partial gflag commits.
